model_patch.entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/search:
--- a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/search/ContactSearch.ets
+++ b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/search/ContactSearch.ets
@@ -1,3 +1,60 @@
+@Reusable
+@Component
+struct ContactSearchListItem {
+  @State item: SearchContactListItem = {} as SearchContactListItem
+  @State presenter: ContactSearchPresenter = {} as ContactSearchPresenter
+  @State isPC: boolean = false
+
+  aboutToReuse(params: Record<string, ESObject>) {
+    this.item = params.item
+    this.presenter = params.presenter
+    this.isPC = params.isPC
+  }
+
+  build() {
+    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.BottomEnd }) {
+      Row() {
+        SearchPhotoView({ item: this.item, presenter: this.presenter })
+        Column() {
+          ContactSearchInfo({
+            name: this.item.contact.name.replace(hasComma, COMMA_REPLACE).split(labelMatch),
+            organization: this.item.contact.organization.replace(hasComma, COMMA_REPLACE).split(labelMatch),
+            phoneNumbers: this.item.contact.phoneNumbers,
+            inputKeyword: this.presenter.inputKeyword,
+            positions: this.item.contact.position.replace(hasComma, COMMA_REPLACE).split(labelMatch),
+            emails: this.presenter.processData(this.item.contact.emails),
+            imInfo: this.presenter.processData(this.item.contact.imInfo),
+            familyAddress: this.presenter.processData(this.item.contact.familyAddress),
+            note: this.item.contact.note.replace(hasComma, COMMA_REPLACE).split(labelMatch),
+            nickname: this.item.contact.nickname.replace(hasComma, COMMA_REPLACE).split(labelMatch),
+            nameHasHighlightLabel: this.item.contact.name.includes('em'),
+            organizationRemoveHighlightLabel:
+            this.item.contact.organization.replace(new RegExp('<\/?.+?>', 'g'), ''),
+            positionRemoveHighlightLabel:
+            this.item.contact.position.replace(new RegExp('<\/?.+?>', 'g'), ''),
+            nameIsEmpty: StringUtil.isEmpty(this.item.contact.name)
+          })
+        }
+        .flexShrink(1)
+        .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Start)
+        .margin({
+          start: this.isPC ? LengthMetrics.vp(0) :
+          LengthMetrics.resource($r('app.float.id_card_margin_xxl'))
+          })
+      }
+      .alignItems(VerticalAlign.Center)
+      .width('100%')
+      .constraintSize({
+        minHeight: this.isPC ? $r('app.float.id_item_height_large') :
+        $r('app.float.id_item_height_max')
+      })
+    }
+  }
+}
+
 @Entry
 @Component
 struct ContactSearch {
@@ -550,42 +607,10 @@
             }

model_patch.entry/src/main/ets/pages/favoritepage/fa:
--- a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/favoritepage/favorite.ets
+++ b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/favoritepage/favorite.ets
@@ -1,5 +1,150 @@
+@Reusable
+@Component
+struct FavoriteListItemComponent {
+  @State isShowHead: boolean = false
+  @State senderNumber: string = ''
+  @State isChatbotMessage: boolean = false
+  @State msgType: number = 0
+  @State msgContent: string = ''
+  @State contentType: string = ''
+  @State msgId: number = 0
+  @State isSender: number = 0
+  @State isAdvancedSecurity: boolean = false
+  @State detectResContent: string = ''
+  @State item: LooseObject = {}
+  @State index: number = 0
+  @State textDirection: string = 'ltr'
+  @State isPC: boolean = false
+  @State isPad: boolean = false
+  @State padMargin: Resource = $r('sys.float.margin_left')
+  @State screenWidth: number = 0
+  @State scrollEndIndex: number = 0
+  @State scrollStartIndex: number = 0
+  @State mFavoriteCtrl: FavoriteController | null = null
+  @State context: Context | null = null
+  @State pageInfos: NavPathStack | null = null
+  @State listScroller: Scroller | null = null
+  @State favoriteContentAlignRules: AlignRules | null = null
+  @State multiSelectFlag: Visibility = Visibility.Hidden
+  @State longPressDeleteItem: LooseObject | null = null
+  @State delConversionController: CustomDialogController | null = null
+  @State dotNoNeedParmas: DotEventParams = { moduleName: '', eventName: '' }
+  @State dotCommon: DotCommon = new DotCommon()
+
+  aboutToReuse(params: Record<string, ESObject>) {
+    this.isShowHead = params.isShowHead
+    this.senderNumber = params.senderNumber
+    this.isChatbotMessage = params.isChatbotMessage
+    this.msgType = params.msgType
+    this.msgContent = params.msgContent
+    this.contentType = params.contentType
+    this.msgId = params.msgId
+    this.isSender = params.isSender
+    this.isAdvancedSecurity = params.isAdvancedSecurity
+    this.detectResContent = params.detectResContent
+    this.item = params.item
+    this.index = params.index
+    this.textDirection = params.textDirection
+    this.isPC = params.isPC
+    this.isPad = params.isPad
+    this.padMargin = params.padMargin
+    this.screenWidth = params.screenWidth
+    this.scrollEndIndex = params.scrollEndIndex
+    this.scrollStartIndex = params.scrollStartIndex
+    this.mFavoriteCtrl = params.mFavoriteCtrl
+    this.context = params.context
+    this.pageInfos = params.pageInfos
+    this.listScroller = params.listScroller
+    this.favoriteContentAlignRules = params.favoriteContentAlignRules
+    this.multiSelectFlag = params.multiSelectFlag
+    this.longPressDeleteItem = params.longPressDeleteItem
+    this.delConversionController = params.delConversionController
+    this.dotNoNeedParmas = params.dotNoNeedParmas
+    this.dotCommon = params.dotCommon
+  }
+
+  getAvatarMargin(): Margin {
+    if (this.textDirection === 'rtl') {
+      return {
+        top: 16,
+        right: this.isPC ? 24 : this.isPad ? this.padMargin : $r('sys.float.margin_right')
+      }
+    } else {
+      return {
+        top: 16,
+        left: this.isPC ? 24 : this.isPad ? this.padMargin : $r('sys.float.margin_left')
+      }
+    }
+  }
+
+  getNameAndPicture() {
+    return this.mFavoriteCtrl?.nameAndPicture(this.senderNumber)
+  }
+
+  getContactId(): string {
+    return this.mFavoriteCtrl?.contactIdMap.get(this.senderNumber) ?? ''
+  }
+
+  handleChatbotClick(): void {
+    this.pageInfos?.pushPathByName('RcsDetailsChatbotActivity', {
+      id: this.senderNumber,
+      icon: ''
+    } as LooseObject)
+    DotUtil.getInstance().reportEvent(this.dotNoNeedParmas,
+      this.dotCommon.eventName.OPEN_CHATBOT_DETAIL)
+  }
+
+  handleAvatarClick(): void {
+    this.mFavoriteCtrl?.titleBarAvatar(this.context, this.senderNumber)
+  }
+
+  handleMenuMultSelect(selectIndex: number): void {
+    this.multiSelectFlag = Visibility.Visible
+    this.mFavoriteCtrl?.listCheckBoxChange(this.index, true)
+  }
+
+  handleMenuDelete(deleteItem: LooseObject): void {
+    this.longPressDeleteItem = deleteItem
+    this.mFavoriteCtrl?.clickLongPressDelete()
+    this.delConversionController?.open()
+  }
+
+  buildMmsContentMap(item: LooseObject, index: number, id: string): void {
+    // This method will be called from parent, need to pass as callback
+  }
+
+  build() {
+    RelativeContainer() {
+      if (this.isShowHead) {
+        if (this.senderNumber) {
+          if (this.isChatbotMessage) {
+            ContactAvatar({
+              rawContactId: '',
+              contactId: '',
+              item: this.item
+            })
+              .margin(this.getAvatarMargin())
+              .id('favorite_list_avatar')
+              .onClick(() => this.handleChatbotClick())
+          } else {
+            ContactAvatar({
+              hasYellowPageIcon: this.getNameAndPicture()?.hasYellowPageIcon,
+              yellowPageId: this.getNameAndPicture()?.yellowPageId,
+              rawContactId: this.getContactId(),
+              contactId: this.getContactId(),
+              item: this.item,
+            })
+              .onClick(() => this.handleAvatarClick())
+              .margin(this.getAvatarMargin())
+              .id('favorite_list_avatar')
+          }
+        } else {
+          ContactAvatar({
+            rawContactId: this.mFavoriteCtrl?.nameNoPicture('')?.rawContactId,
+            contactId: this.mFavoriteCtrl?.nameNoPicture('')?.contactId,
+            item: this.item
+          })
+            .margin(this.getAvatarMargin())
+            .id('favorite_list_avatar')
+        }
+      }
+      FavoriteName({
+        hasYellowPageIcon: this.getNameAndPicture()?.hasYellowPageIcon,
+        item: this.item,
+        isPad: this.isPad,
+        isShowHead: this.isShowHead,
+        textDirection: this.textDirection,
+      })
+      if (this.msgType === 0 || this.msgType === 2) {
+        bubbleText({
+          conversationCtrl: this.mFavoriteCtrl,
+          content: this.msgContent,
+          item: this.item,
+          itemIndex: this.index,
+          bubbleTextBackgroundColor: this.isSender === 0
+            ? $r('app.color.brand') : $r('sys.color.ohos_id_color_card_bg'),
+          isAdvancedSecurity: this.isAdvancedSecurity,
+          isSender: this.isSender,
+          detectResContent: this.detectResContent,
+          textDirection: this.textDirection,
+          listScroller: this.listScroller,
+          scrollEndIndex: this.scrollEndIndex,
+          scrollStartIndex: this.scrollStartIndex,
+          menuMultSelect: ((selectIndex: number) => {
+            this.handleMenuMultSelect(selectIndex)
+          }),
+          menuDeleteCallBack: ((deleteItem: LooseObject) => {
+            this.handleMenuDelete(deleteItem)
+          })
+        }).margin({ top: 4, bottom: 8 })
+          .alignRules(this.favoriteContentAlignRules!)
+          .id('favorite_list_content')
+      }
+      else if (this.msgType === 1) {
+        if (MmsUtil.isSlideType(this.contentType)) {
+          FavoriteSlideComponent({
+            itemIndex: this.index,
+            item: this.item,
+            listScroller: this.listScroller,
+            scrollEndIndex: this.scrollEndIndex,
+            scrollStartIndex: this.scrollStartIndex,
+            menuMultSelect: ((selectIndex: number) => {
+              this.handleMenuMultSelect(selectIndex)
+            }),
+            menuDeleteCallBack: ((deleteItem: LooseObject) => {
+              this.handleMenuDelete(deleteItem)
+            })
+          }).alignRules(this.favoriteContentAlignRules!)
+            .id('favorite_list_content')
+        } else if (this.mFavoriteCtrl?.mmsScreening(this.msgId, 8)) {
+          // MMS location message - handled by parent callback
+        } else if (!this.msgContent &&
+          this.mFavoriteCtrl?.mmsScreening(this.msgId, 1)) {
+          const mmsData = this.mFavoriteCtrl.mmsScreening(this.msgId, 1)
+          MmsContentImage({
+            imageProps: mmsData.locationPath ?? '',
+            ct: mmsData.ct ?? '',
+            screenWidth: this.screenWidth,
+            itemIndex: this.index,
+            item: this.item,
+            listScroller: this.listScroller,
+            scrollEndIndex: this.scrollEndIndex,
+            scrollStartIndex: this.scrollStartIndex,
+            menuMultSelect: ((selectIndex: number) => {
+              this.handleMenuMultSelect(selectIndex)
+            }),
+            menuDeleteCallBack: ((deleteItem: LooseObject) => {
+              this.handleMenuDelete(deleteItem)
+            })
+          }).alignRules(this.favoriteContentAlignRules!)
+            .id('favorite_list_content')
+        }
+      }
+    }
+  }
+}
+
 // ... existing imports and code ...

model_patch.entry/src/main/ets/pages/managesim/Manag:
--- a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/managesim/ManageSim.ets
+++ b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/managesim/ManageSim.ets
@@ -1,5 +1,56 @@
 import { myCommon } from '../../utils/myCommon';
 import { ManageSimController } from '../../controller/ManageSimController';
+import { LooseObject } from '../../utils/Utils';
+
+@Reusable
+@Component
+struct SimMessageItem {
+  @State name: string = ''
+  @State content: string = ''
+  @State timeRange: string = ''
+  @State index: number = 0
+  onDoubleTap: (index: number) => void = () => {}
+
+  aboutToReuse(params: Record<string, ESObject>) {
+    this.name = params.name
+    this.content = params.content
+    this.timeRange = params.timeRange
+    this.index = params.index
+    this.onDoubleTap = params.onDoubleTap
+  }
+
+  build() {
+    Column() {
+      Text(this.name)
+        .textAlign(TextAlign.Start)
+        .fontSize(10)
+        .lineHeight(13)
+        .fontColor($r('sys.color.font_secondary'))
+        .margin({ top: 8, right: 5 })
+      // Message Bubble
+      ManageSimBubbleText({
+        bubbleTextBorderRadius: [4, 24],
+        bubbleTextDirection: 'left',
+        content: this.content,
+        bubbleTextBackgroundColor: $r('sys.color.ohos_id_color_card_bg')
+      })
+        .constraintSize({ maxWidth: 284 })
+        .gesture(
+          TapGesture({ count: 2 })
+            .onAction(() => {
+              this.onDoubleTap(this.index)
+            })
+        )
+      Text(this.timeRange)
+        .textAlign(TextAlign.Start)
+        .fontSize(10)
+        .lineHeight(13)
+        .fontColor($r('sys.color.font_secondary'))
+        .margin({ top: 8, right: 5 })
+    }
+    .width('100%')
+    .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Start)
+    .margin({ bottom: 20 })
+  }
+}
 
 @Component
 export struct ManageSim {
